verdict.summary: The class-partitioned batching change is internally consistent and fail-closed: unknown or non-slim diffs remain in the engine class, legacy omnibus branches conservatively suppress both classes, per-class action state prevents conflict/abort leakage, and the 15-constituent cap preserves ascending selection. The expanded hermetic self-test exercises classification, legacy parsing, two-class planning, per-class suppression, cap behavior, conflict re-templating, and cross-class abort isolation on the real planner/executor paths. Workflow routing now runs that self-test when either side of the ci_select import contract changes. No correctness, soundness, security, or vacuous-test defect is evident in the supplied diff.
